drifts.description: R5 (5.0.0) retains stage.summary but the associated value set binding is updated and clarified
R5 (5.0.0) adds a participant backbone element replacing asserter and recorder individually; not present in R4
R5 (5.0.0) removes Condition.asserter; functionality moved to Condition.participant with function code
R5 (5.0.0) removes Condition.recorder; functionality moved to Condition.participant with function code
R5 (5.0.0) restructures evidence from backbone element with code/detail to a CodeableReference type
R5 (5.0.0) retains bodySite as CodeableConcept but adds a parallel bodyStructure Reference(BodyStructure) element
R5 (5.0.0) onset[x] allowed types are unchanged but the canonical reference version is updated
